name: wiki-modal-dialog
description: Native <dialog> element modal with showModal() focus trap. Used for image lightbox, search overlay, and confirmation prompts. Dismisses on Escape or backdrop click.
html:
{{title}}

{{content}}

variants.name: search-overlay
variants.description: Search input + live results as content.

aria: dialog.showModal() creates a native focus trap; all content outside the dialog is unreachable. aria-labelledby points to visible <h2> title. aria-describedby points to body div. Close button: aria-label='Close dialog', positioned first in DOM for Tab-first focus or autofocus attr. Escape key: native <dialog> handles Escape → 'cancel' event → call dialog.close().
